items.title: Avrea raises $4.7M to fix CI/CD before AI coding breaks it
items.summary: The Helsinki startup, founded by Aiven’s Hannu Valtonen and Nosto’s Juha Valvanne, is betting that AI-generated code will overwhelm existing build pipelines. Helsinki startup Avrea emerged from stealth on Tuesday with $4.7m in pre-seed funding led by Earlybird, pitching itself as a faster, AI-aware

items.title: Spain blocks Polymarket and Kalshi over missing gambling licences
items.summary: A three-to-four month suspension while Madrid’s gambling watchdog investigates makes Spain the latest European jurisdiction to treat prediction markets as unlicensed betting. Spain has temporarily blocked the US-based prediction markets Polymarket and Kalshi for operating in the country without a ga

items.title: A battery-powered Starlink Mini is likely on the way
items.summary: Code in recent Starlink firmware suggests that SpaceX might soon release a version of its smallest internet dish with an integrated battery. A battery-powered Starlink Mini would offer untethered portability for vanlifers, emergency responders, and anyone who wants fast, low-latency internet from al

items.title: Paris preventive-health startup Lucis raises $20M Series A four months after seed
items.summary: Paris-based Lucis, a preventive-health platform that pairs blood biomarker testing with an AI-driven companion app, has raised a $20m Series A led by Singular, with participation from General Catalyst, Y Combinator and angel investors including Céline Lazorthes of Resilience, Manu Lecomte, and backe

items.title: GSR Ventures uses its RedNote stake to anchor a new $350M China fund
items.summary: SR Ventures Management Co., one of the earliest backers of the Chinese social commerce app Xiaohongshu, is raising about $350m for a new China-focused venture fund and is using its existing stake in the app, known internationally as RedNote, as the central pitch, according to a Bloomberg report on T

items.title: Anthropic će Mythos učiniti dostupnim široj javnosti
items.summary: Opće izdanje biti predstavljeno nakon što razviju "daleko jače zaštitne mjere" i nakon konzultacija s ključnim partnerima, uključujući američke i savezničke vlade.

items.title: Vedran Blagus, novi partner LAUNCHuba: Skratit ćemo put hrvatskim osnivačima do serije A
items.summary: Bugarski LAUNCHub Ventures jača prisutnost u Hrvatskoj, a u tom zadatku važnu će ulogu imati i njihov novi partner Vedran Blagus. Razgovarali smo s njim što će to značiti za hrvatsku startup scenu!

items.title: Sam Altman says an AI jobs apocalypse is unlikely
items.summary: The OpenAI chief, speaking in the Asia-Pacific, walked back the more dramatic predictions of broad employment collapse. The data, so far, agrees with him. OpenAI chief executive Sam Altman said on Tuesday that artificial intelligence was unlikely to trigger the broad employment collapse that has com

items.title: HGK traži održive inovacije, pobjednicima 5000 eura i put u Švedsku
items.summary: Hrvatski startupi i scaleupi koji razvijaju rješenja za energiju, recikliranje, mobilnost ili klimu do kraja srpnja mogu ući u utrku za novčanu nagradu i izlazak pred investitore. Natjecanje cilja tvrtke koje su već odmakle od ideje i traže brži put do tržišta i partnera.

items.title: Finland’s Quanscient raises €10M to build a quantum- and AI-native simulation platform
items.summary: The Tampere startup wants to rebuild physics simulation as the data engine for AI-driven hardware design. items.title: Samsung’s non-chip union goes to court to halt bonus vote
items.summary: A smaller Samsung Electronics union representing roughly 13,000 workers in the company’s smartphones, televisions and home appliances divisions has filed an injunction at South Korea’s Suwon District Court to halt an ongoing companywide vote on a bonus deal that would deliver a windfall to memory ch

items.title: Ferrari unveils the Luce, a five-seat electric car co-designed with Jony Ive
items.summary: The Maranello firm’s first all-electric model starts at €550,000, runs to more than 1,000 horsepower and arrives with deliveries in the fourth quarter. items.title: Huaweijev odgovor na sankcije nije bolji čip, nego drugačija definicija
items.summary: Huawei najavio novi zakon skaliranja čipova, cilja gustoću tranzistora ekvivalentnu 1,4 nm procesu do 2031. Je li ovo tehnološki proboj ili savršeno upakiran kompromis?

items.title: Brussels prepares biggest-ever DMA penalty for Google
items.summary: The European Commission is preparing to fine Google a sum running into the high hundreds of millions of euros for breaching the Digital Markets Act, according to a Handelsblatt report on Monday, in what would be the largest penalty ever issued under the bloc’s new tech competition regime. items.title: Motion Cues - nastoji ublažiti mučninu od koje pati mnogi tijekom vožnje
items.summary: Kod mnogih se javljaju različiti simptomi mučnine tijekom vožnje, a premda postoji više načina kako ih je moguće ublažiti ili u potpunosti ukloniti, postoje i aplikacije koje u tome pomažu, a jedna od njih upravo je Motion Cues…

items.title: HP Victus 15 u izvedbi s AMD procesorom je gaming laptop s Nvidia RTX 5060 grafičkom karticom
items.summary: Kombinacija cijene i dovoljnih gaming mogućnosti dugogodišnja je formula za Victus modele koji su HP-ov odgovor za povoljniji laptop za igranje. Osim solidne CPU-GPU kombinacije, kao treću važnu osobinu gaming modela donosi stopu osvježavanja ekrana od 144 Hz

items.title: Post, doručak i mozak: kad si gladan, jesi li još uvijek svoj?
items.summary: Velika metaanaliza pokazuje da kratkotrajni post kod zdravih osoba ne narušava kognitivnu izvedbu, što znači da je mozak ipak otporniji i prilagodljiviji nego što to sugerira suvremena prehrambena mitologija
